canonical_definition: An English dataset for data-to-text generation, consisting of Wikipedia tables with highlighted cells paired with a sentence describing those cells.
papers: Bridging the Semantic Gap Between Text and Table: A Case Study on NL2SQL

relationships.evidence: We first run experiments on four data-to-text generation datasets. ToTTo (Parikh et al., 2020) is an English dataset with Wikipedia tables where specific cells are highlighted, paired with a sentence describing those cells. (Section 4.1)
